scene.message: Ayase: What's this big talk?{nl} Ayase's busy right now!!{waitkey}{ret}
Toro: U-um, Ayase...{nl} u-um um um um um um{waitkey}sorry for calling you out.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hurry up and finish!{nl} I've got somewhere to be!!{waitkey}{ret}
Toro: W-wait, please!!{waitkey}Why am I a pass?{nl} What's wrong with me?{waitkey}{ret}
